chapter_title.ar: بَابُ قَطْعِ تَلْبِيَةِ الْمُحْرِمِ وَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 209 – Cutting off of Talbiyya by the one in Ihraam and what is upon him, from the deeds

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/237)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/237)
text: يَقْطَعُ صَاحِبُ الْعُمْرَةِ الْمُفْرَدَةِ التَّلْبِيَةَ إِذَا وَضَعَتِ الْإِبِلُ أَخْفَافَهَا فِي الْحَرَمِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Murazam,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The performer of the exclusive Umra would cut off the Talbiyya when the camel places its hooves in the Harram’.
en.sarwar: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Murazim who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that one who performs a separate al-‘Umrah should discontinue Talbiyah (here I am, O Lord, to obey Your command) as soon as the camel sets foot in al- Haram (the sacred area).”
